steps.name: 0. Авторизация пользователя "SYSADMIN"
Send "SYSADMIN" keys to the "Поле "
Send "Tdm365" keys to the "Поле[1] "
Click on the "Кнопка "
1. Переход в раздел "Объекты"
Click on the "Application  -> Header [Is displayed == True] -> Objects Button "
2. Создание Объекта разработки
Context click on the "Application  -> Tree View [Is displayed == True] -> Tree View Item [Has Text == True] AND [Text == TDM365] -> Text "
Click on the "Context Menu  -> Context Menu Item [Has Text == True] AND [Text == Создать объект разработки]"
Send "xunit" keys to the "Dialog  -> Body  -> Input Component [System Identifier == ATTR_OCC_CODE] -> Input "
Send "07.05.2026 20:38:11 Автотестовый объект" keys to the "Dialog  -> Body  -> Text Area Component [System Identifier == ATTR_OCC_NAME] -> Input "
Send "Создано автотестом" keys to the "Dialog  -> Body  -> Text Area Component [System Identifier == ATTR_DESCRIPTION] -> Input "
Click on the "Dialog  -> Footer  -> Button [Has Text == True] AND [Text == OK]"
3. Проверка Объекта разработки

Double click on the "Application  -> Tree View [Is displayed == True] -> Tree View Item [Has Text == True] AND [Text == TDM365] -> Tree View Item [Has Text == True] AND [Text == xunit 07.05.2026 20:38:11 Автотестовый объект] -> Text "
4. Создание Проекта
